prompt: Create a cinematic anime illustration in a wide 16:9 canvas showing three versions of the same elegant adult woman in one warm, sunlit interior scene. The character is an unnamed mature female teacher, with long dark brown hair with soft violet highlights, delicate facial features, large calm eyes, a gentle melancholic expression, and a graceful, intelligent presence. Place the largest version in the center foreground, seated close to the viewer in a pale ribbed knit top and soft beige skirt, long loose hair falling over her shoulders, one hand touching her hair, looking directly at the viewer with a quiet, intimate expression. On the left, show the same woman as a teacher standing near a chalkboard, wearing thin glasses, a fitted navy suit jacket and pencil skirt over a white blouse, holding an open book in one hand and a piece of chalk or pen in the other. On the right, show the same woman seated on a sofa by a bright window, hair tied loosely back, wearing a pale long-sleeved knit top and beige skirt, holding a dark mug while reading an open book on her lap. Include exactly three visible character instances: central seated portrait, left teacher at chalkboard, and right relaxed reader on sofa. The room should blend a classroom and cozy study: large bright windows, chalkboard with faint handwritten Japanese-style notes, bookshelves or books near the lower background, a soft sofa, hints of a kitchen or warm domestic interior on the far right, and blurred flowers in the lower-right foreground. Use golden afternoon backlight with soft haze and floating dust motes, luminous rim light on hair and shoulders, shallow depth of field, painterly high-detail anime rendering, refined linework, realistic fabric folds, elegant proportions, subtle blush, glossy eyes, and a romantic slice-of-life atmosphere. Color palette should be warm cream, mauve, lavender shadow, soft brown, and muted navy. Avoid text overlays, logos, watermarks, extra characters, distorted hands, or changing the character identity between the three poses.

promptZh: 创作一张 16:9 宽画幅的电影感动漫插画，在温馨明亮的室内场景中展示同一位优雅成年女性的三个版本。角色为 一位未具名的成熟女教师，拥有 带有柔和紫罗兰色挑染的长深棕色头发，五官精致，双眸沉静，神情温婉忧郁，气质优雅知性。将最大的人物版本置于前景中央，身着浅色罗纹针织衫和柔和米色半身裙，长发自然垂落在肩头，一只手轻抚发丝，正视镜头，神情安静而亲密。左侧展示同一位女性作为教师站在黑板旁，戴着细框眼镜，深蓝色修身西装外套搭配铅笔裙和白衬衫，一手拿着打开的书本，另一手拿着粉笔或钢笔。右侧展示同一位女性坐在明亮窗边的沙发上，头发随意扎起，身着浅色长袖针织衫和米色半身裙，手持深色马克杯，膝上放着一本打开的书。画面中需包含恰好三个可见的角色实例：中央坐姿肖像、左侧黑板旁的教师、以及右侧沙发上放松阅读的形象。房间应融合教室与舒适书房的风格：宽大的明亮窗户、带有模糊日式手写笔记的黑板、背景下方的书架或书籍、柔软的沙发、远端右侧隐约可见的厨房或温馨家居内饰，以及右下角模糊的花卉。使用 带有柔和雾气和漂浮尘埃的金色午后逆光，头发和肩部带有明亮的轮廓光，浅景深，细腻的动漫渲染风格，精致的线条，逼真的布料褶皱，优雅的比例，淡淡的腮红，明亮的双眸，以及浪漫的生活片段氛围。色调应为暖奶油色、淡紫色、薰衣草色阴影、柔和棕色和柔和的深蓝色。避免出现文字覆盖、徽标、水印、多余角色、手部畸变，或在三个姿态间改变角色身份。
